meaning: n.楼梯每一级的前缘,或保护此处的金属板
examples: We found a man nosing around in our backyard.
People kept nosing around the place, interrupting my work.
Near the plowed fields curved and faded, and the few hogs nosing in the furrows looked like large spotted stones.
He had an encyclopedic knowledge of commodities, picked up while nosing around the BSE library.
One such, the Carlyle Group, is nosing around the European aerospace industry in search of bargains.
